rows.label: qev085701_MSG0001
rows.name:
Hey, if it isn't Elma. I've got a
sweet deal, care to get in on it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085701_MSG0003
rows.name:
Hey, hey, at least show
a little interest.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085701_MSG0004
rows.name:
If it was truly a good deal, you would keep it
to yourself, wouldn't you? I'm not exactly
eager to get dragged into something sketchy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085701_MSG0005
rows.name: Wow, you don't mince words, do you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085701_MSG0006
rows.name:
In these situations, just hearing someone
out is what they call common courtesy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085701_MSG0008
rows.name:
I mean, yeah, from Earth...
Even though we're on Mira now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085701_MSG0010
rows.name:
Then I'll be waiting behind the
diner. In the Industrial District.
Don't go to the wrong place.[ST:wait ]
